problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: Spintronics for low-power data storage may resolve What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
